evaluation_criteria:
{"all_complete_correct":"The workspace contains at least one function definition and a function is called at least twice in the code, and the function is called within a play_together block so it layers with other parts of the sond

Example:
```
play_together
  repeat 2
    beatBreakdown()
  play sequentual:
    play "pack/vocal_verse_1"
    play "pack/vocal_verse_2"
play_together
  play "pack/vocal_chorus_1"
  play "pack/drums_track_1"
play_together
  repeat 2
    beatBreakdown()
  play sequentual:
    play "pack/vocal_verse_3"
    play "pack/vocal_verse_4"
```","partial_complete_correct":"The workspace contains at least one function definition and a function is called at least twice in the code, but the function does not play together with other tracks or functions

Example:
```
beatBreakdown()
play "pack/vocal_verse_1"
play "pack/vocal_verse_2"
beatBreakdown()
play "pack/vocal_verse_3"
play "pack/vocal_verse_4"
```","incomplete_incorrect":"The workspace contains at least one function definition, but each function is called exactly once under the `when run` block}
